name: minimap-next
description: A preview of the full source code

autoToggle.title: Show Minimap On Startup
autoToggle.description: Automatically show the minimap when Pulsar starts.

displayMinimapOnLeft.title: Display Minimap On Left
displayMinimapOnLeft.description: When enabled, the minimap is displayed on the left side of the editor instead of the right.

displayCodeHighlights.title: Display Code Highlights
displayCodeHighlights.description: Render syntax-colored tokens in the minimap. Disabling this draws plain text and may improve performance.

displayPluginsControls.title: Display Plugins Controls
displayPluginsControls.description: Show the quick-settings button that lets you toggle minimap plugins. Requires a restart to take effect.

adjustMinimapWidthToSoftWrap.title: Adjust Minimap Width To Soft Wrap
adjustMinimapWidthToSoftWrap.description: When soft wrap and soft wrap at preferred line length are both enabled, cap the minimap width to match the preferred line length.

charWidth.title: Character Width
charWidth.description: Width of each character block in the minimap, in pixels.

charHeight.title: Character Height
charHeight.description: Height of each character block in the minimap, in pixels.

interline.title: Interline Spacing
interline.description: Extra vertical space between lines in the minimap, in pixels.

textOpacity.title: Text Opacity
textOpacity.description: Opacity of the rendered text in the minimap. Lower values make the code less prominent.

independentMinimapScroll.title: Independent Minimap Scroll On Mouse Wheel
independentMinimapScroll.description: When enabled, scrolling the mouse wheel over the minimap moves the minimap independently without scrolling the editor. The minimap still syncs back whenever the editor itself is scrolled.

scrollSensitivity.title: Independent Scroll Sensitivity
scrollSensitivity.description: Scroll speed multiplier used when independent minimap scroll is enabled.

redrawDelay.title: Redraw Delay (ms)
redrawDelay.description: Minimum time in milliseconds between minimap redraws triggered by text changes. Higher values improve responsiveness on large files; 0 redraws immediately on every change.

devicePixelRatioRounding.title: Device Pixel Ratio Rounding
devicePixelRatioRounding.description: Round the device pixel ratio used for canvas rendering. Disable if you see blurry or misaligned pixels on fractional-DPI displays.

useHardwareAcceleration.title: Use Hardware Acceleration
useHardwareAcceleration.description: Use CSS transforms for positioning, which enables GPU compositing and reduces repaints.

maxTokensInOneLine.title: Max Tokens Per Line
maxTokensInOneLine.description: Maximum number of syntax tokens rendered per line. Reducing this can improve performance on files with very long lines.

minimap-next.description: Exposes the minimap API to other packages
